name: haven
description: Your new Voice, Video and Chat application to connect with your friends!
author: Cloudly <haven@becloudly.eu>

scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint
scripts.dev:strict: bun run check && bun run dev
scripts.package: bun run build && bun run tauri:build
scripts.package:win: bun run build && bun run tauri:build
scripts.package:mac: bun run build && bun run tauri:build
scripts.package:linux: bun run build && bun run tauri:build
